scripts.docs:snapshot: npm run docs:seed-demo-vault && cargo run --bin tasknotes-tui -- --root docs/demo-vault --focus-date 2026-03-29 render-snapshot --width 120 --height 32 > docs/vhs/output/overview.txt
scripts.docs:screenshotty:all: npm run docs:screenshotty:overview && npm run docs:screenshotty:workflow
scripts.conformance:test:rust: cargo build && TASKNOTES_TUI_BRIDGE_MODE=rust TASKNOTES_ADAPTER=../tasknotes-tui/js/tasknotes-spec-adapter.mjs npm --prefix ../tasknotes-spec run conformance:test
